Policy unchanged: profitable + trailing-stop-active + price>EMA-21 + no earnings within 2 days + sentiment not negative + 5% gap-risk cushion all required simultaneously. No position has met all six criteria. The thin, extended candidate pool continues to prevent qualified entries, let alone overnight candidates.
